center.name: 長島
center.summary: 長島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Chuck-will's-widow、黑巾文鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mostly found in the southeastern United States (with disjunct populations in Long Island, New York; Ontario, Canada; and Cape Cod, Massachusetts) near swamps, rocky uplands, and pine woods

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: * Nominate race occurs in island of New Britain, Long Island and Rooke Island
